production_claim_rule: The system may not describe itself as autonomous, enterprise-grade, secure, compliant, calibrated, or production-ready until the specifically relevant gate evidence exists and is independently reviewable.

gates.name: epistemic_credibility
gates.objective: Remove unsupported certainty and make every consequential claim traceable or explicitly hypothetical.
exit_evidence: dashboard and API claims trace to evidence or carry a simulation/hypothesis label
heuristic scores are not called probabilities
current capabilities and limitations are explicit
gates.hold_rule: No new external autonomy or production claim while AG0 is open.

gates.name: durable_control_plane
gates.objective: Enforce identity, contracts, capabilities, approvals, budgets, separation of duties, audit, and kill switches outside the models.
exit_evidence: unauthorized actions cannot bypass action class, budget, approval, or tool boundaries
R3 and R4 actions require designated human records
kill switches operate without model cooperation
gates.hold_rule: Agents remain analysis or sandbox only until AG1 clears.

gates.name: evidence_and_decision_ledger
gates.objective: Persist claims, assumptions, evidence, contradictions, experiments, decisions, approvals, and outcomes with provenance.
exit_evidence: a venture decision reconstructs from raw signal to authorization and verified outcome
cross-venture reuse preserves scope and confidentiality
stale and contradictory evidence is visible
gates.hold_rule: No gate advancement may depend on ephemeral memory.

gates.name: hardened_agent_runtime
gates.objective: Contain untrusted content, tools, secrets, models, egress, spawning, and side effects.
exit_evidence: defined prompt, memory, tool, privilege, data, and model attacks are denied or contained
no ambient production credential enters a model context
model and prompt rollback is proven
gates.hold_rule: External action remains human-executed until the relevant runtime control is proven.

gates.name: first_complete_venture_pod
gates.objective: Take one opportunity through paid, repeatable operation with isolated agents and bounded human supervision.
exit_evidence: one customer-visible recurring workflow creates measured business value
external actions and payments reconcile
isolation, budget, escalation, and shutdown controls work under incident conditions
gates.hold_rule: Do not create concurrent production Venture Pods before AG4 clears.

gates.name: controlled_recursive_specialization
gates.objective: Prove that child agents and shared assets make a second venture reach evidence faster or cheaper without authority or data leakage.
exit_evidence: second venture improves time-to-proof or cost-to-proof against a defined comparator
worker quotas and expiry hold
no private payload crosses ventures
gates.hold_rule: Recursive specialization remains sandboxed when its measured benefit or containment is unproven.

gates.name: portfolio_allocation
gates.objective: Reallocate capital and attention through precommitted evidence, risk, cash, concentration, and shared-asset rules.
exit_evidence: repeated allocation decisions follow policy
weak ventures lose capital despite sunk cost
allocation is compared against equal or intuition-driven baselines
mission and stakeholder guardrails remain satisfied
gates.hold_rule: Allocation outputs remain recommendations until calibration and governance evidence clear.

gates.name: enterprise_assurance
gates.objective: Establish independently reproducible security, reliability, privacy, legal, model-risk, vendor-risk, and recovery evidence.
exit_evidence: independent reviewers reproduce control design, tests, findings, exceptions, and remediation state
critical findings are closed or explicitly accepted by authorized owners with expiry
production SLOs and recovery objectives are measured under failure
gates.hold_rule: No broad enterprise-grade or high-autonomy claim before AG7 evidence is current.
